required_fields: tokenizer family; source date; paper/repository surface; mechanism scope; model-specific caveat
prohibited_shortcuts: Do not turn BPE/SentencePiece/tiktoken into a claim about exact modern tokenizer behavior, multilingual fairness, semantic understanding, or language cost.
ready_to_caption_when: page/section refs and quote-safe paraphrase are selected

required_fields: raw source; transformation step; disclosed corpus; date; local hash or identified-only status; missing proprietary-corpus caveat
prohibited_shortcuts: Do not imply open datasets reveal closed frontier-model mixtures, legal cleanliness, representativeness, quality rank, adoption, or benchmark superiority.
ready_to_caption_when: source surface is locally captured and exact table/page scope is recorded

required_fields: paper; measured setting; term definition; condition boundary; what the paper does not prove
prohibited_shortcuts: Do not convert deduplication, memorization, or extraction findings into product safety, universal privacy, solved-contamination, legal, or model-specific prevalence claims.
ready_to_caption_when: definitions and measured-scope rows are extracted

required_fields: source type; documentation/governance problem; corpus/date; why it is a caution surface; missing local capture status
prohibited_shortcuts: Do not use provenance-caution cards as proof of closed-model data use, illegality, representativeness failure, or broad multilingual quality.
ready_to_caption_when: local source capture or explicit cited-only decision exists
